backstory.original: By wood, river, cavern, and vale, nomads of the Shaar spread the tale of Kalix the Exile. Gifted in combat from a young age, this thri-kreen warrior amassed a collection of trophies, garnering acclaim from the others of his tribe--the Krakk't. However, the hunter was never satisfied. He dreamed of quarry none would dare. At the Hill of Memories, during the yearly gathering, Kalix attacked the emissaries of the other tribes. None could deny his prowess. For this act, he was banished and forced to wander the world, searching for purpose. Now Kalix offers his services to all who promise a worthy hunt, and woe unto any foe he marks as his prey.
backstory.display: 在树木、河流、洞穴和溪谷之间，夏亚的流浪者们传颂着流亡者卡利克斯的故事。这位从小便拥有战斗天赋的螳螂人战士积攒了许多战利品，也赢得了他所在部落克拉克特其他人的赞誉。然而，这名猎手从未感到满足。他梦想猎杀无人敢猎取的猎物。在记忆之丘的年度聚会上，卡利克斯袭击了其他部落的使者。无人能否认他的勇猛，但由于这一行为，他被流放了，被迫在世界各地流浪，寻找自己的目标。现在，谁能保证让他猎杀到值得追逐的猎物，他就为谁效力，而但凡被他视作猎物的敌人都在劫难逃。

description.original: Kalix throws a Chatkcha at the closest enemy, dealing 1 hit.
description.display: 卡利克斯向最近的敌人投掷一枚螳螂镖，造成 1 次打击。

longDescription.original: Kalix throws a Chatkcha at the closest enemy, dealing 1 hit.
longDescription.display: 卡利克斯向最近的敌人投掷一枚螳螂镖，造成 1 次打击。

description.original: Kalix makes 5 attacks against random enemies, dealing ultimate damage and stunning them.
description.display: 卡利克斯对随机敌人发动 5 次攻击，造成杀招伤害，并使他们眩晕。

longDescription.original: Kalix makes 5 attacks against random enemies, dealing ultimate damage and stunning them for 5 seconds due to his paralyzing poison.
longDescription.display: 卡利克斯对随机敌人发动 5 次攻击，造成杀招伤害，并且他的麻痹毒素会使他们眩晕 5 秒。

description.desc: While Kalix is in the front column of any party, your active party's damage is increased by $(amount)%. This means this ability affects your active party even if Kalix is not in your active party (as long as they're in the front-most column of their party).
当卡利克斯处于任何探险队的最前列时，你当前探险队的伤害增加 $(amount)%。这意味着即使卡利克斯不在你当前的探险队中，这项技能也会影响你当前的探险队（只要卡利克斯处于其所在探险队的最前列）。

tipText.original: While Kalix is in the front column of any party, your active party's damage is increased, even if Kalix is in a background party!
tipText.display: 当卡利克斯处于任何探险队的最前列时，你当前探险队的伤害会增加，即使卡利克斯在后台探险队中也能触发此效果！

description.desc: Kalix telepathically increases the damage of all Champions not adjacent to him by $(amount)%.
卡利克斯会通过心灵感应，使所有不与他相邻的勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

Kalix gains an Ally stack for each Champion in the formation that is not a Standard species. He increases the effect of Mindlink by $(amount)% for each Ally stack, stacking multiplicatively. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
阵型中每有一名不是标准种族的勇士，卡利克斯获得一层“盟友”层数。每拥有一层“盟友”层数，他会使“心灵连接”的效果提升 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。标准种族是指神裔、龙裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、巨人、半身人、人类、兽人、提夫林、半兽人和半精灵。

tipText.original: Kalix buffs Champions not next to him, and these buffs increase based on the number of Champions that are not a Standard species.
tipText.display: 卡利克斯会增益不与他相邻的勇士，而且这些增益会根据非标准种族勇士的数量而提升。

conditions.desc: Enemies that attempt to choose Kalix as a target do not, and instead choose to attack another Champion, assuming another valid target exists. The effect of Mindlink is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% each time this triggers, stacking multiplicatively up to $max_stacks times and losing $(stack_percentage_lost_on_area_change___2)% of stacks when changing areas.

Enemies that attempt to choose Kalix as a target do not, and instead choose to attack another Champion, assuming another valid target exists. The effect of Mindlink is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% each time this triggers, stacking multiplicatively up to $max_stacks times and resetting when changing areas.
尝试选择卡利克斯为目标的敌人现在不会攻击他，而是改为攻击另一勇士（假定存在另一有效目标）。此效果每次触发时，“心灵连接”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks 层；变更区域后，堆叠的层数损失 $(stack_percentage_lost_on_area_change___2)%。
尝试选择卡利克斯为目标的敌人现在不会攻击他，而是改为攻击另一勇士（假定存在另一有效目标）。此效果每次触发时，“心灵连接”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks 层；变更区域后，堆叠的层数重置。

description.desc: Humanoids are Kalix's favorite foe. All Champions deal $(amount___2)% additional damage against Kalix's favored foes.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target does $amount% more damage against Kalix's Favored Foes

description.desc: 类人生物是卡利克斯偏好的对手。所有勇士会对卡利克斯的偏好对手造成额外 $(amount___2)% 的伤害。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target会对卡利克斯的偏好对手造成额外 $amount% 的伤害

description.desc: The most represented species in your formation grant additional Ally stacks for Unorthodox Alliance (even if it is not a Standard species). In the case of a tie, Champions from all tied species grant an additional Ally stack.
你阵型中最具代表性的种族会为“异端联盟”带来额外的“盟友”层数（即便该种族不是标准种族）。如果有并列的情况，那么所有并列最具代表性种族的勇士都会带来额外的“盟友”层数。

specializationDescription.original: Kalix aligns himself with one well represented species, making his telepathic bond with his allies even stronger.
specializationDescription.display: 卡利克斯与一个极具代表性的种族结盟，使得他与盟友的心灵感应纽带变得更强。

description.desc: The maximum stacks of Chameleon Carapace are doubled, and 50% of the current stacks are not reset when you change areas.

effect_keys.description: The maximum stacks of Chameleon Carapace are doubled, and 50% of the current stacks are not reset when you change areas.

description.desc: “变色龙甲壳”的最大层数增加一倍，且变更区域后，当前层数的 50% 不会重置。

effect_keys.description: The maximum stacks of Chameleon Carapace are doubled, and 50% of the current stacks are not reset when you change areas.

specializationDescription.original: Kalix improves his camouflage skills, making him a more dangerous threat when he is frequently attacked.
specializationDescription.display: 卡利克斯提升他的伪装技能，使他在经常受到攻击时成为更危险的威胁。

name.original: One For You, One For Me

description.desc: Kalix gains the Speed role and each time a monster spawns that is not his favored foe, one or more of his favored foes simultaneously spawn. The effect of The Deadliest Prey is also increased by 400%.
卡利克斯获得速度角色，且每当刷新一个不是他偏好对手的怪物时，会同时刷新一个或多个他的偏好对手。同时“最致命的猎物”的效果提升 400%。

specializationName.original: One For You, One For Me

specializationDescription.original: Kalix concentrates on his hunting abilities, quickly tracking down his favored foes and making them more vulnerable to damage.
specializationDescription.display: 卡利克斯专注于他的猎杀技能，快速追踪他的偏好对手，使他们更容易受到伤害。

description.original: The clutch is all. My first lesson. I have not forgotten.
description.display: 族群就是一切。这是我学的第一课，我没有忘记。

description.original: Are you predator, or prey? Join me. Learn. The hunt welcomes all.
description.display: 你是捕猎者还是猎物？来和我一起，学习吧。狩猎欢迎所有人。

description.original: I see into your mind. I sense your weakness. I know your strength.
description.display: 我能看透你的内心。我能感觉到你的软弱。我知道你的实力。

description.original: I need not speak your tongue to know your ways.
description.display: 无需与你言语，我便能洞悉你的处事之道。

description.original: Thoughts are like blades. They can be sharpened.
description.display: 思想就跟刀刃一样，是可以打磨锋利的。

description.original: Prove to me your prowess, and I shall call you kin.
description.display: 向我证明你的勇猛，那样我就认你为自己人。

description.original: To become unseen is to become their undoing.
description.display: 不被他们看见，就能要了他们的命。

description.original: They never see it coming.
description.display: 他们绝对不会料到的。

description.original: They are all prey. I permit them to prove me wrong.
description.display: 他们全都是猎物。我允许他们证明我说错了。

description.original: I have tested them many times. All have failed.
description.display: 我考验过他们很多次了。全都没及格。

description.original: They think themselves above us all. I will bring them low.
description.display: 他们自以为高我们所有人一等。我会把他们拉下来的。

effects.description: Add Celestial as a favored foe for Kalix.

description.original: I will break them into pieces. I will scatter their remains.
description.display: 我会把它们打得粉碎。我会四处抛洒它们的残骸。

effects.description: Add Construct as a favored foe for Kalix.

description.original: A lack of anatomy is a false shield. I will destroy them, utterly.
description.display: 没有骨头并非真正的护盾。我会彻底消灭他们的。

effects.description: Add Ooze as a favored foe for Kalix.

description.original: Hunting is an art. Death, a spectacle. Are you not entertained?
description.display: 狩猎是一门艺术。死亡是一场精彩的表演。你不为此感到愉悦吗？

description.original: I am their end. I am inevitable.
description.display: 我是他们的结局。我就是劫数。

description.original: The clutch is all. The clutch IS all. The clutch is ALL.
description.display: 族群就是一切。族群就是一切。族群就是一切。

description.original: No matter their form, they all bleed the same.
description.display: 不管它们是何形态，它们都一样会流血。

effects.description: Add Monstrositity as a favored foe for Kalix.

description.original: Your end approaches. Bear witness.
description.display: 你的末日快到了。好好看着吧。

name.display: 红宝石玫瑰骑士卡利克斯

character_sheet_details.backstory: By wood, river, cavern, and vale, nomads of the Shaar spread the tale of Kalix the Exile. Gifted in combat from a young age, this thri-kreen warrior amassed a collection of trophies, garnering acclaim from the others of his tribe--the Krakk't. However, the hunter was never satisfied. He dreamed of quarry none would dare. At the Hill of Memories, during the yearly gathering, Kalix attacked the emissaries of the other tribes. None could deny his prowess. For this act, he was banished and forced to wander the world, searching for purpose. Now Kalix offers his services to all who promise a worthy hunt, and woe unto any foe he marks as his prey.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Kalix is a Support and Hunter Champion who excels in formations featuring unorthodox species. This Thri-kreen harnesses his telepathic abilities to boost the damage of Champions that aren't next to him, and he's skilled at tracking down his favored foe: humanoids. Kalix also increases the damage of your active party when he is positioned in the front column of a formation, making him an invaluable resource once you have access to multiple adventuring parties.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 在树木、河流、洞穴和溪谷之间，夏亚的流浪者们传颂着流亡者卡利克斯的故事。这位从小便拥有战斗天赋的螳螂人战士积攒了许多战利品，也赢得了他所在部落克拉克特其他人的赞誉。然而，这名猎手从未感到满足。他梦想猎杀无人敢猎取的猎物。在记忆之丘的年度聚会上，卡利克斯袭击了其他部落的使者。无人能否认他的勇猛，但由于这一行为，他被流放了，被迫在世界各地流浪，寻找自己的目标。现在，谁能保证让他猎杀到值得追逐的猎物，他就为谁效力，而但凡被他视作猎物的敌人都在劫难逃。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 卡利克斯是一名支援和猎手型勇士，他在异端种族勇士占主导的阵型中表现优异。这名螳螂人勇士会利用他的心灵感应技能来提升那些不与他相邻的勇士的伤害，而且他擅长追踪他偏好的对手：类人生物。当卡利克斯位于一个阵型的最前列时，他还会提升你当前探险队的伤害，因此，当你拥有多支探险队时，卡利克斯是一项极其有用的资源。
